Simple Process

Book in 4 Easy Steps

1
Book Online
Choose your test on our website or app. Health Advisors available 24/7.
2
Home Collection
Certified phlebotomist visits your home. Zero extra charges, any time slot.
3
Lab Processing
Samples processed at NABL-accredited labs. Expert pathologist verification.
4
Smart Reports
AI-powered digital reports via email & app with free doctor consultation.

About HealthLabh

सही जांच, बेहतर स्वास्थ्य लाभ — A decade of trust, quality, and scientific excellence in Indian diagnostics.

Our Mission

Making Diagnostics Accessible for All

HealthLabh was established with a vision to make diagnostic healthcare affordable, accessible, and equitable for every Indian family. We combine the reach of a pan-India routine diagnostics network with the depth of world-class genomic testing.

Over the past decade, HealthLabh has served more than 25 million patients by building awareness about early intervention and empowering healthcare providers with actionable insights across critical disease areas such as rare diseases, oncology, and reproductive healthcare.
